title: IPL 2024: MI vs CSK
description: The El Clasico of IPL is back! Watch five-time champions Mumbai Indians take on the legendary Chennai Super Kings in a high-octane clash at the historic Wankhede Stadium.

title: T20 World Cup: IND vs PAK
description: Experience the greatest rivalry in world sports! India faces Pakistan in a crucial T20 World Cup fixture. A sold-out Narendra Modi Stadium awaits this historic encounter.

title: IPL 2024: RCB vs KKR
description: Expect fireworks as Kohli's RCB takes on Iyer's KKR at the batting paradise of Chinnaswamy. A high-scoring thriller is on the cards.

title: IPL 2024: GT vs RR
description: A clash of the titans! The 2022 champions GT host the inaugural champions RR in an afternoon spectacle.

title: Women's Premier League: DC vs UPW
description: Watch the rising stars of women's cricket battle it out in the capital. Delhi Capitals look to defend their home turf against the Warriorz.
